# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Widget

The `%%steps` cell magic and the `StepsWidget` it renders.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [StepsWidget](StepsWidget.qmd#steps_widget.widget.StepsWidget) | Displays the substitution/reduction trace of `# PRINT STEPS`-tagged |
| [register_steps_magic](register_steps_magic.qmd#steps_widget.widget.register_steps_magic) | Register the `%%steps` cell magic. |

## Command line

The `print-steps` console script.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [run_student_file](run_student_file.qmd#steps_widget.print_steps.run_student_file) |  |
